pi_items.source: Task setup script (setup_sumo.sh) copies data/bologna_acosta/* to this path.
Task setup script and export_result.sh explicitly check this path.
Task setup script and export_result.sh explicitly check this path.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires computing a 120-second free-flow travel time isochrone representing ambulance reachability in the Bologna Acosta traffic network. The network data is based on a real-world scenario of Bologna, Italy (data_is_synthetic is false). Ground-truth analysis via sumolib confirms the correct starting edge is '114', and there are exactly 5 reachable edges within the 120-second limit ('114', '121', '203[1]', '203[1]b', 'm2'). The agent must identify '114' as the start edge and save outputs to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/isochrone_summary.txt and /home/ga/SUMO_Output/isochrone_selection.txt.
